CREATE TABLE my_table (id INTEGER, value VARCHAR);
CREATE TABLE my_table2 (id INTEGER, foreign_id INTEGER);
SELECT * FROM my_table WHERE id IN (SELECT foreign_id FROM my_table2 WHERE id = 1);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM my_table2 JOIN my_table ON my_table.id = my_table2.foreign_id WHERE my_table.value LIKE 'test%';
CREATE TABLE my_nested_table AS SELECT id, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM my_table2 WHERE foreign_id = my_table.id) AS count FROM my_table;
SELECT count FROM my_nested_table WHERE id = (SELECT id FROM my_table WHERE value = 'test1');
CREATE TABLE my_aggregation AS SELECT value, COUNT(*) AS occurrences FROM my_table GROUP BY value;
